chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 429 of 2021 Applicant: Muhammad Abdul Wahid through M/s. Khawaja Muhammad Azeem & Muteeullah, Advocates Respondent: The State through Ms. Robina Qadir, Addl.P.G. a/w Mr. Mubashir Ahmed Mirza, Advocate for respondent Nos.2&3. Date of hearing: 23rd May, 2023 ORDER Omar Sial, J: This is an application seeking cancellation of bail granted to Abdul Waheed and Majeed in a case arising out of F.I.R. No. 133 of 2021 registered under section 395 P.P.C. by the learned 4th Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi West on 23.06.2021. 2. There is no complaint that the accused are not attending trial or that they are tampering with evidence or a misusing the concession of bail in any manner whatsoever. Learned counsel has relied solely on an observation made by the learned trial in the bail granting order i.e. no incriminating article was recovered from the accused. This counsel asserts was a wrong observation. It very well might be a wrong observation but the same will be clarified at trial. 3. No ground for cancellation of bail having been made out, the application is dismissed. JUDGE
